title: GitHub Actions LSP release tags alongside CLI publish

source.subject: feat(cli): add `beskid lsp` subcommand for editor stdio server

body:
## What shipped

GitHub Actions publish LSP binaries with versioned tags alongside existing CLI release assets for editor bootstrap.

## Source commit

Repository **`compiler`** · commit `a86a6d6`

> feat(cli): add `beskid lsp` subcommand for editor stdio server

## Completed

2026-05-25 (catalog cutoff window).
